Trataka Dhyana
🕯️ Candle Gazing Meditation
Trains one-pointed focus (Dharana). Counters the fragmented attention patterns caused by addiction. Rebuilds prefrontal-cerebellar pathways.
5:00
Gaze steadily at the flame without blinking.
When eyes water — close gently and visualise.
Do not think. Just see.
Ayurvedic Support
🌱
Ashwagandha
Lowers cortisol, reduces withdrawal anxiety, raises baseline HRV over 8–12 weeks. 300mg extract with warm milk, twice daily.
🧠
Brahmi (Bacopa)
Rebuilds neural pathways damaged by substance use. Improves working memory and impulse control within 8–12 weeks.
🪥
Oil Pulling (5 min)
Swish sesame or coconut oil each morning. Removes oral toxins, reduces inflammatory cytokines linked to craving circuits.
🫁
Nasya (Nasal Oil)
2 drops warm sesame oil per nostril. Calms prana vata — the nervous energy that drives cravings.

Reclaim v1.0.0 · Made with ❤️ for recovery
Terms & Conditions
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing and using Reclaim, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Reclaim is designed to support — not replace — professional medical or addiction treatment.
2. Medical Disclaimer
Reclaim is a wellness and monitoring application. It does not provide medical diagnoses, treatment, or professional counseling. HRV data and risk assessments are informational only. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions.
3. Data Privacy & Security
Your health data is encrypted and stored securely. We do not sell your personal or health data to third parties. You may request deletion of your data at any time. We comply with DPDPA (India) and GDPR.
4. User Responsibilities
You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure. You agree to use the App only for lawful purposes and must not attempt to reverse-engineer or misuse any feature of the App.
5. Wearable Device Integration
Reclaim integrates with third-party wearable devices. We are not responsible for inaccuracies caused by third-party hardware. Ensure your device is properly calibrated for accurate HRV readings.
6. Limitation of Liability
Reclaim and its creators shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect harm arising from reliance on the App's data. In a health emergency, contact emergency services immediately.
7. Changes to Terms
We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance. Last updated: March 2025.
Help & FAQ
What is HRV and why does it matter? +
Heart Rate Variability (HRV) measures the variation in time between heartbeats. Higher HRV indicates a healthy, resilient autonomic nervous system. In recovery, low HRV can signal elevated stress or potential relapse risk.
How does Reclaim detect relapse risk? +
Reclaim analyzes RMSSD and SDNN scores from continuous RR interval data. When HRV drops below your personal baseline threshold, the app triggers a risk alert and suggests coping strategies.
Which wearables are supported? +
Apple Watch (Series 4+), Samsung Galaxy Watch, Polar H10 chest strap, Fitbit Sense/Versa 3+, and any Bluetooth heart rate monitor that provides RR interval data.
Is my health data private? +
Yes. All health data is end-to-end encrypted. We never sell your data. You can delete all your data from Settings at any time.
What should I do when I get a high risk alert? +
Go to the Support tab and try Box Breathing first. If the feeling intensifies, use peer support chat or call the helpline. Alerts are early warnings — giving you time to act before a crisis.
Can I use Reclaim without a wearable? +
Yes! Use your phone's rear camera with PPG (photoplethysmography). Place your fingertip over the camera for a 60-second reading. Accuracy is lower than a chest strap but still useful.
How do I reset my password? +
On the login screen, tap "Forgot password?" and enter your registered email. You'll receive a reset link within 2 minutes.
Still need help?
Our support team is here for you, 24/7.
